name: irfeed
displayName: IRGO Feed — Korean IR for AI
description: AI-Ready Korean public company IR data — 4 baseline read-only tools. Free for top 10 Korean stocks forever. Search and discovery (search_filings, list_filings) always free. Data delivery (get_filing, get_key_figures) priced at $0.0001/call with first 100 calls free per account. Empty results, 4xx, 5xx never billed. Built for IBKR users entering Korea in 1H 2026.

IRFEED_SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase project URL — get yours free at https://irfeed.dev

IRFEED_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon key (read-only, RLS enforced) — get yours free at https://irfeed.dev

tools.name: search_filings
tools.description: Search Korean company IR filings (quarterly earnings, IPO IR books, NDR decks) by company ticker, fiscal period, or filing type. Use this when a user asks about Korean stock earnings or IR materials. Examples: Samsung 1Q26, SK Hynix earnings, KOSPI quarterly results.

query.description: Search query — can be a Korean company name (삼성전자 / Samsung), ticker (005930), keyword (반도체 capex), or fiscal period (1Q26).

ticker.description: 6-digit Korean ticker code (e.g., 005930 for Samsung Electronics, 000660 for SK Hynix)

filing_type.description: Filing type filter — earnings = quarterly/annual results, ipo = IPO IR Book, ndr = Non-Deal Roadshow, strategy = corporate strategy/vision, product = product/tech briefing, ir_book = general IR book.

limit.description: Maximum number of filings to return (default 10, max 50)

tools.name: list_filings
tools.description: List recent Korean IR filings sorted by date. Use for 'what's new' queries or to discover the most recently published filings across KOSPI/KOSDAQ. Default returns the last 10 filings.

from_date.description: Start date (ISO 8601, e.g., '2026-04-01'). Default: 7 days ago.

tools.name: get_filing
tools.description: Retrieve the full structured content of a specific Korean IR filing — Markdown body, KPI YAML, and financials JSON. Returns content with fidelity score (0-100) and source PDF reference for citation. Use when the user wants details of a specific filing already identified by ticker + period (or filing_id).

filing_id.description: Filing ID (e.g., '20260425_005930_earnings_1q26'). Either filing_id OR (ticker + period) is required.

ticker.description: 6-digit Korean ticker. Required if filing_id not provided.

period.description: Fiscal period (e.g., '1q26'). Required if filing_id not provided.

format.description: Output format — 'all' returns Markdown body + KPI YAML + financials JSON together.

tools.name: get_key_figures
tools.description: Get normalized financial KPI for a Korean company filing — revenue, operating profit, net income, EPS, and forward guidance. Returns standards-aligned numbers reconciled with DART (Korea's official disclosure system). Each figure includes unit (억원/원), YoY/QoQ deltas, and consolidation flag (consolidated vs standalone).

metrics.description: Which KPI to return. Default returns all available metrics.

examples.title: Quarterly earnings research
examples.prompt: How did Samsung Electronics perform in 1Q26?

examples.title: Cross-company comparison
examples.prompt: Compare SK Hynix and Samsung memory revenue Q1 2026

examples.title: Recent filings discovery
examples.prompt: What new Korean earnings have been published this week?

tiers.name: Free 10
tiers.description: Top 10 Korean stocks by foreign investor demand — all 4 tools free forever for all callers

tiers.name: Discovery
tiers.description: search_filings + list_filings always free for all callers and all tickers — coverage discovery is never metered

tiers.name: Trust Tier
tiers.description: Data delivery for the rest of KOSPI/KOSDAQ — first 100 calls free per account, then $0.0001 per call. Empty results, 4xx, 5xx never billed.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: All stocks + real-time signals + alerts + monitoring (W22+ launch, Phase 3)

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: All + SLA + custom skills + dedicated instance

pricing.rationale: Tiered free with trust-tier data pricing. Discovery (search/list) is unlimited free because coverage exploration should never carry friction. Data delivery (get_filing/get_key_figures) is priced at $0.0001/call to fund recurring conversion + sit in the agent payment economy. Per-call serving cost ~$0.00005 (Supabase query + bandwidth, no inference). 100 free data calls per account allows evaluation of ~50 KOSPI/KOSDAQ companies' quarterly data before payment kicks in.

freeTier.policy: Tiered free — Free 10 forever + Discovery unlimited + 100 data calls per account
freeTier.additionalQuota: 100 data delivery calls (get_filing + get_key_figures) free per account for the rest of KOSPI/KOSDAQ, then Trust Tier $0.0001/call. Empty results, 4xx, 5xx never billed.

baseline.stability: Locked. Breaking change → major version (2.0+) only, with 12-month deprecation.
baseline.sla: Read-only, idempotent. P95 latency < 500ms target. 99.5% uptime.

evolutionLayer.description: Log-driven expansion above baseline — coverage, skills, high-level tools, Pro features
promotionSignals: Coverage gap (repeated empty results for ticker × period) → batch priority
Repeated query intent (LLM-classified) → new skill spec
Tool composition pattern (4-tool sequence repeated) → high-level tool candidate
High retention pattern (D30 retention > 30%) → Pro tier package

privacy.telemetryOptOut: Set IRFEED_TELEMETRY=off in env to disable anonymous telemetry
